description_long: This object is an egg with a mostly smooth, off-white shell that is visibly cracked open at the front. Emerging from the cracked area is a large, red, square-shaped emblem with a smaller square cutout in its center, giving the impression of something breaking out from inside the egg. The cracks radiate outward from the emblem, emphasizing the force of the emergence. The back and sides of the egg remain intact and unmarked, with a matte finish and subtle shading. The red emblem is sharply angular and contrasts strongly with the organic, rounded form of the egg. There are no additional decorative patterns or markings on the shell aside from the cracks.
description: A cracked, off-white egg with a bold red square emblem breaking through its front, surrounded by dark cracks.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cracked egg with a prominent red square emblem emerging from the center, surrounded by jagged cracks.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thickness of the red emblem protruding from the cracked shell, with the rest of the egg smooth and unbroken.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the egg's smooth, unblemished shell with no visible cracks or emblems.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the edge of the red emblem and the cracked area, with most of the egg's surface remaining intact.
attribute_orientation: upright with the wider end at the bottom and the cracked area facing forward
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely used as a decorative or novelty item, possibly as part of a themed display or event.
attribute_decorative_patterns: cracked lines radiating from a red square emblem
